biography:
[nars•is•sist] n.
Rule Breaker. Image Maker. Risk Taker.
Founded by makeup artist and photographer François Nars in 1994.

relatedProfiles.full_name: Clé de Peau Beauté | クレ・ド・ポー ボーテ

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Just swipe and glow. François Nars’ iconic innovation, The Multiple, creates shimmering accents and dynamic highlights with a unique, cream-to-powder formula. Available @sephora.
Give lips the signature Orgasm glow. Orgasm Lip Mask nourishes with a conditioning formula, leaving lips looking soft, smooth, and healthy. Now available @nordstrombeauty.
Everything to see here. Summer Unrated Eyeshadow Palette delivers intense pigment for high-intensity looks that last.
Plot twist: Afterglow Lip Balm indulges lips with a sheer hint of color *and* helps protect with a nourishing blend of antioxidants.

Set your reminder. Join us Tuesday at 12 pm EST for an exclusive #LifeOnNARS: Mother's Day Makeup Moment with #NARSArtist @JennyAtwoodSmith and her mom, Landis. Tune in to watch the duo share beauty secrets, discuss their go-to products, and create a 1940s-inspired look.

Set your reminder. Join us Tuesday at 12 pm EST for an exclusive #LifeOnNARS: Mother's Day Makeup Moment with #NARSArtist @JennyAtwoodSmith and her mom, Landis. Tune in to watch the duo share beauty secrets, discuss their go-to products, and create a 1940s-inspired look.

Get sunkissed in just two steps with new Summer Unrated Blush/Bronzer Duo. 
1. Sweep Bronzing Powder onto skin starting at the temple, across the cheek, and along the jawline.
2. Apply Blush to the apples of the cheek. Sweep any excess across the hairline, bridge of the nose, and chin.

Matte neutrals. Warm bronzes. Exotic pink tones. Powered by high-impact pigment. 
Which will you choose? Limited-edition Summer Unrated Eyeshadow Palette features 16 shades for effortless eye intensity.

Three ways to Orgasm with our new Orgasm Lip Mask: 
🌙 Wear overnight as a deep treatment while you sleep. 
☀️ Wear alone to keep lips feeling hydrated. 
⚡ Use as a base to ensure lips are smooth and prepped for color application. Available @ultabeauty.

“Makeup should always look like real skin.”—François Nars, Founder & Creative Director

@samsaa wears Light Reflecting Foundation for breathable, buildable coverage with a natural finish. #YourBestLight
